stdout:
Usage: gaia trace verify [OPTIONS] TRACE_PATH

 Verify trace schema and hash chain.

 Fast schema + hash-chain check (seconds, fail-fast). Loads the trace,
 validates each event's prev_hash forms an unbroken chain from
 GENESIS, then checks the manifest's ``events_root`` and
 ``manifest_hash`` against recomputed values.

 Exit codes:
   * 0 вЂ” clean
   * 1 вЂ” hash chain / manifest mismatch (tampering)
   * 2 вЂ” schema error / unreadable file

 Example:

 .. code-block:: bash

     gaia trace verify path/to/trace.json
     gaia trace verify path/to/trace.jsonl --quiet

в•­в”Ђ Arguments в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
